name: Flash
passive: Overclock: each correct answer adds bonus damage and stacks a multiplier; a wrong answer resets the stack.
ultimateDescription: For ~30 seconds, every correct answer deals bonus damage and builds a stacking damage multiplier. One mistake resets the snowball.

name: Shadow
description: You can't answer what you can't read.
passive: Neural Jam: on each of your questions, the opponent's inputs lock briefly, their timer is tighter, and wrong answers while jammed hurt more.
ultimateDescription: For ~30 seconds, each new question for your opponent starts with a short input lock and less time to think. Wrong answers during the jam take extra damage. Two choices may stay hidden under glitch static.

name: Guardian
description: Everything you throw at me comes right back.
passive: Reflect Bastion: incoming damage is reduced; prevented damage is stored and released in one burst at the end of the ultimate.
ultimateDescription: For ~32 seconds, reduce incoming damage. Prevented damage builds in storage, then fires back at your opponent in a single shockwave when the ultimate ends.

name: Blaze
description: The longer you survive, the hotter it gets.
passive: Blaze Surge: each correct answer applies stacking burn damage over time that keeps ticking even when the opponent answers correctly.
ultimateDescription: For ~30 seconds, each correct answer adds burn stacks. Burn ticks down their HP over time; stacks grow with more hits.

name: Architect
premiumTagline: I don’t fight your game. I rewrite it.
howItPlays: Perfect Sequence rewards precision: stack correct answers for a massive burst; miss and the sequence breaks. You also mitigate damage while the ultimate runs.
passive: Perfect Sequence: build stacks on correct answers; at a threshold, unleash a huge burst and reset. Wrong answers break the chain.
ultimateDescription: For ~38 seconds, each correct stacks toward a precision burst. Miss to lose the stack. Premium: faster ultimate charge, stronger burst, and better mitigation while active.

name: Titan
premiumTagline: I don’t lose trades. I win them.
howItPlays: Overpower: harder hits, heal from damage dealt, and wrong answers do not self-damage while the ultimate is up.
passive: Overpower: increased damage on correct answers, lifesteal from damage dealt, and hits bypass the opponent's damage reduction while active.
ultimateDescription: For ~38 seconds, deal more damage on correct answers, heal based on damage dealt, and ignore damage reduction on your strikes. Wrong answers do not self-damage. Premium: faster ultimate charge and heavier hits.
